IOException not wrapped in MongoSocketOpenException; internal exception mapping bug, no spec rule violated.

Document that JMXConnectionPoolListener no longer auto-registers; documentation fix, no spec.

Add toString() methods and fix existing toString() in model classes; API ergonomics, no spec.

SDAM spec requires monitoring socket timeout = connectTimeoutMS; MongoClientSettings used infinite timeout instead.
